summary: Iteration 37 - Add to Cart for Personal Sessions Testing COMPLETE. All features tested and working correctly. Sessions can be added to cart from both homepage and session detail page. Cart displays session items with 'Personal Session' badge, duration, and time slot information. Toast notifications work for add/duplicate attempts. Time slot selection works on detail page (note: homepage sessions don't have time_slots configured in data).
critical_code_review_comments: CartContext.js: addSessionItem correctly checks for duplicates by sessionId+date+time combo
SessionsSection.jsx: Add to Cart button positioned below 'View Details & Book' with proper data-testid
SessionDetailPage.jsx: Add to Cart button positioned below 'Book Now' with proper data-testid
CartPage.jsx: Session items display with 'Personal Session' badge, duration, selectedDate, selectedTime badges
Header.jsx: Cart count badge updates correctly using itemCount from CartContext
context_for_next_testing_agent: Add to Cart functionality for sessions is fully implemented. Cart supports two item types: 'program' and 'session'. Session items have type='session', sessionId, selectedDate, selectedTime fields. Time slots on homepage depend on session.time_slots data (currently empty for most sessions). Time slots on detail page come from calendar.time_slots API. Admin button colors are applied correctly.

homepage_time_slots.note: Time slots on homepage require session.time_slots to be configured. Currently sessions don't have time_slots in their data. Code correctly renders them when present.
